checks.name: Learning lifecycle state machine implemented
checks.detail: PROPOSED → REVIEWED → PROMOTED → CONSUMABLE → SUPERSEDED + REJECTED branch, governed transitions, fail-closed

checks.name: Invalid transition raises LifecycleViolation
checks.detail: REVIEWED → CONSUMABLE correctly rejected

checks.name: Transition log is append-only
checks.detail: Each transition appends to transition_log with actor_id, justification, timestamp

checks.name: Central learning registry loads
checks.detail: learning_registry.json loaded — 5 events, 5 capability classes, 5 consumption declarations

checks.name: Registry seeded with Phase 7 events
checks.detail: LRNE-P7-0001 through LRNE-P7-0005 ingested with capability_class and registry_metadata

checks.name: Capability classes defined
checks.detail: 5 classes: SEMANTIC_DERIVATION, EVIDENCE_INTAKE, CODE_GRAPH_ENRICHMENT, SPINE_MANAGEMENT, GOVERNANCE_WORKFLOW

checks.name: Consumption declarations registered
checks.detail: 5 pipeline phases declare capability class consumption with governance_level and replay_guarantee

checks.name: Query by capability_class works
checks.detail: SEMANTIC_DERIVATION query returns 2 events (LRNE-P7-0001, LRNE-P7-0003)

checks.name: Consumable resolution respects lifecycle state
checks.detail: All events at PROPOSED — resolve_consumable_for_consumer returns 0 (correct: only CONSUMABLE-state events activate)

checks.name: Activation manifest structure complete
checks.detail: manifest_type, activation_summary, consumer_activations, explainability — all fields present

checks.name: Pipeline syntax valid
checks.detail: ast.parse on run_client_pipeline.py succeeds

checks.name: Phase 0L integrated into pipeline
checks.detail: Learning Registry Load runs before Phase 1 — Source Boundary

checks.name: Phase 10L integrated into pipeline
checks.detail: Learning Activation Manifest runs after Phase 9 — Selector Update

checks.name: Non-blocking when registry empty
checks.detail: Phase 0L returns True with empty learning context when no consumable events

checks.name: Non-blocking when module unavailable
checks.detail: Phase 0L catches ImportError and proceeds without learning awareness

checks.name: consumer_type extensible for agents
checks.detail: PIPELINE_PHASE, ENRICHMENT_AGENT, MARKETPLACE_CAPABILITY — three consumer types documented

checks.name: Capability classes map to enrichment capabilities
checks.detail: Each class lists target_capabilities (e.g., tier_classifier, scip_code_graph_enricher)

checks.name: No self-mutation in pipeline
checks.detail: Governance model is ADVISORY_NON_MUTATING — learnings are recorded, not executed

checks.name: Replay contract defined
checks.detail: Same registry state + same run inputs → same activation manifest

checks.name: Explainability answerable
checks.detail: Every run answers: 'Which historical learnings influenced this result?' via activation manifest

checks.name: Architecture document complete
checks.detail: LEARNING_CONSUMPTION_ARCHITECTURE.md covers lifecycle, registry, hooks, manifest, replay, future agentic slots

checks.name: Agentic boundaries preserved
checks.detail: Architecture documents: agents MUST NOT mutate pipeline autonomously, promote without governance, create drift, bypass replay

checks.name: Stream governance artifacts present
checks.detail: execution_report.md, validation_log.json, file_changes.json, CLOSURE.md, IMPLEMENTATION_SEMANTICS.md
